name: search_products
description: Search for products in the catalog using various filters including category, price range, and sorting options.

query.description: Free-text search query to match against product names and descriptions.

category.description: Product category to filter search results by.

sort_by.description: Sorting criterion for the returned product list.

price_min.description: Minimum price filter in the default currency.

price_max.description: Maximum price filter in the default currency.
